name: docker-build
description: Condensed docker build: step names, final result, and errors

tests.name: buildkit output
tests.input:
[+] Building 12.3s (8/8) FINISHED
 => [internal] load build definition from Dockerfile                       0.0s
 => => transferring dockerfile: 234B                                       0.0s
 => [internal] load .dockerignore                                          0.0s
 => => transferring context: 2B                                            0.0s
 => [1/3] FROM docker.io/library/node:18-alpine                            0.0s
 => CACHED [2/3] WORKDIR /app                                              0.0s
 => [3/3] COPY . .                                                         0.5s
 => => transferring context: 1.23MB                                        0.4s
 => exporting to image                                                     0.3s
 => => exporting layers                                                    0.2s
 => => writing image sha256:abc123                                         0.0s
 => => naming to docker.io/library/myapp:latest                            0.0s
tests.expected:
=> [internal] load build definition from Dockerfile                       0.0s
=> [internal] load .dockerignore                                          0.0s
=> [1/3] FROM docker.io/library/node:18-alpine                            0.0s
=> CACHED [2/3] WORKDIR /app                                              0.0s
=> [3/3] COPY . .                                                         0.5s
=> exporting to image                                                     0.3s

tests.name: build error
tests.input:
=> [internal] load build definition from Dockerfile                       0.0s
=> [1/2] FROM docker.io/library/node:18                                   0.0s
=> ERROR [2/2] RUN npm install                                            5.2s
=> => npm ERR! code ERESOLVE
tests.expected:
=> [internal] load build definition from Dockerfile                       0.0s
=> [1/2] FROM docker.io/library/node:18                                   0.0s
=> ERROR [2/2] RUN npm install                                            5.2s
